title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, a Nobel Prize winner and AI pioneer, argues that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must recognize that it is no longer the only intelligent species on Earth.
